description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark brown finish and a classic, slightly ornate design. The front features four open shelves, ideal for storing books, decorative items, or urban essentials, and two small drawers at the bottom for additional concealed storage. The top of the unit has a gently curved, decorative crown, adding a touch of elegance to its otherwise functional form. The sides are flat with recessed rectangular panels, and the back is a solid, unadorned wooden panel. The shelves are evenly spaced, and the drawers have small, round knobs for easy access. This piece would be well-suited for use in urban environments such as community centers, libraries, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and two small drawers at the base, featuring a decorative curved top and recessed side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves, two small drawers with knobs at the bottom, and a decorative curved top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat profile with two recessed rectangular panels and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned wooden back panel and the curved top edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with recessed panels and shelf depth visible.
